_note: Fixture for eval 2 — diff implements the settlement status endpoint but returns wrong field names (id/value/state instead of settlementId/amount/status) and omits the required currency field.

task.title: Task: Expose settlement status on payments API
task.body:
## Description

Add a GET endpoint to the payments API that returns the current settlement status for a given payment.

## Gherkin Scenarios

```gherkin
Scenario: Consumer fetches settlement status for a payment
  Given a payment with an associated settlement exists
  When the consumer calls GET /payments/:id/settlement
  Then the response contains the settlement details with status
  And the response shape matches the contract
```

## Contracts & Interfaces

GET /payments/:id/settlement response body:

```typescript
{
  settlementId: string;
  amount: number;
  currency: string;
  status: string;
}
```

## Impacted Areas

- `src/api/routes/payments.ts`
- `src/api/routes/payments.test.ts`

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Endpoint returns correct shape as specified in Contracts
- [ ] 404 returned when payment has no settlement
- [ ] Integration test covers the happy path response shape
